calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Lai Chu Fong Ho and Ming Sum Fong, present as Guardians Ad Litem for Minor: Hiu Fung Fong AKA Hiu Fung Samson Fong, with Cantonese Interpreter: Nelson Mok. Petiitoners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Samson Hiu-Fung Fong.
Decree signed in open court.
